buttons.primary: bg-purple-700 text-white hover:bg-purple-800 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-50 transition-colors font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-[0_2px_8px_-2px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:border-purple-200
cards.header: px-6 py-4 border-b border-slate-100 flex justify-between items-center bg-slate-50/50

tables.container: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white
tables.header_cell: px-6 py-3 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 text-left

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

bento_grid.news_feed: col-span-1 md:col-span-6 lg:col-span-4 row-span-2 overflow-y-auto max-h-[500px]

general: Switch entire app to Light Mode. Remove all 'dark' class variants or hardcoded dark backgrounds.
Use 'Purple-700' (#7E22CE) as the primary accent color instead of blue or green.
Implement the Bento Grid layout for the main dashboard.
Use Chivo font for headings and Inter for body text.
Ensure all cards have a white background with a subtle border and shadow.
Replace generic icons with company logos and country flags where applicable.

pages.market_data: Create a sortable table with columns: Company, Ticker, Price, Change (%), Market Cap, P/E Ratio. Use red/green badges for changes.
pages.expenditures: Implement a Map view (use react-simple-maps or SVG) showing defense spending by country. Include a sidebar list with flags.
pages.products: Card grid comparison of defense products (Jets, Drones, Tanks). Use the product images provided.
pages.announcements: A vertical news feed list with timestamps and source attribution.

accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratio is at least 4.5:1 against the white background.
Add aria-labels to all icon buttons.
Focus states must be visible (purple ring).

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, keep it clean and flat.
Use generous padding (p-6 or p-8) inside cards.
Always use a clear visual hierarchy with typography scale.
Interactive elements must have hover and active states.
Use skeleton loaders for data fetching states.
